## Sensitive Data Check (Required)

- [ ] No real IP/domain/account/token/key added
- [ ] No private local paths leaked
- [ ] Config examples use placeholders only

## Quality Check

- [ ] `bash scripts/security_check.sh`
- [ ] `bash scripts/review_push_guard.sh origin/main`
- [ ] Relevant tests/build passed locally

## coco / Deploy Readiness

- [ ] Branch pushed to GitHub
- [ ] coco verification planned or completed
- [ ] If deploying, VPS will use SHA-aligned gated pipeline
